chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE PEOPLE ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 26)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 26)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) يَقُولُ آخَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله) بَيْنَ سَلْمَانَ وَ أَبِي ذَرٍّ وَ اشْتَرَطَ عَلَى أَبِي ذَرٍّ أَنْ لَا يَعْصِيَ سَلْمَانَ.

en.hubeali: H 14616 – Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Mansour Bin Al-Abbas, from Suleyman Al-Musattaq, from Saleh Al-Howl who said:

I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘The Rasoolsaww established brotherhood between Salmanar and Abu Dharrar, and stipulated a condition upon Abu Dharrar that hear would not disobey Salmanar (as a younger to an elder brother).
en.sarwar: 168. Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Mansour Bin Al-Abbas, from Suleyman Al-Musattaq, from Saleh Al-Howl who said: I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: ‘The Rasool (saww) established brotherhood between Salman (ar) and Abu Dharr (ar), and stipulated a condition upon Abu Dharr (ar) that he (ar) would not disobey Salman (ar) (as a younger to an elder brother).
